response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified the performer as VTuber Kazama Iroha and the song 'ANIMA' from on-screen text. 2. Performed a search for 'ANIMA ReoNa lyrics' to find the original Japanese lyrics and translation. 3. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-02:37 (Performance), 02:37-04:10 (Talk/Merch promotion). 4. Constructed the JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song 'ANIMA' (originally by ReoNa) by VTuber Kazama Iroha, followed by a talk segment where she promotes her birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs 'ANIMA'. The video displays the song title 'ANIMA' at the top left.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color is the color of your soul?
"I'd rather it stay broken"
I'm not strong enough to throw it away or run away
Look, once more, my heart beats fast
I don't know what is right
But things without form are becoming important
Only unadorned words
Are strongly tied together
Stumbling again, rolling over
Even so, it doesn't break
What color is the color of your soul?
Just getting hurt, acting tough
Even so, I want to find it
I'm confirming the shape of my soul
Alone at the bottom of the deep earth, I look for a door and a key
Fairytales, look, disappear completely like bubbles
Only conflict and afterimages extend to the next page
The growing branches split
Each walks their own path
Only lonely memories
Are deeply rooted
Even so, it doesn't crumble
Where is the heart?
Where is the vessel?
Just being left behind and falling out
Even so, I want to convey
The days of the soul
The will of the soul
Always, always
What color is the color of your soul?
Is it red?
Is it blue?
The color of the soul
The color of the soul
What color is it?
What color is it?
In a transparent past
In an opaque tomorrow
What color are you living?
Stumbling again, rolling over
Even so, it doesn't break
What color is the color of your soul?
Just getting hurt, acting tough
Even so, I want to find it
I'm confirming the shape of my soul
Always, always, always, always

scenes.description: The performer concludes the performance, drinks water, and transitions to a talk segment to promote her birthday goods.
